task_completion.description: Verify that a new case named 'Evidence_Handover_2024' was created in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy main window should be open with 'Evidence_Handover_2024' visible in the title bar, case dashboard, or the root of the tree view on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify that the disk image 'jpeg_search.dd' was added as a data source to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autopsy left-hand tree view, under 'Data Sources', there should be an entry for 'jpeg_search.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 10 JPEG images were tagged with the custom tag 'Investigator_Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autopsy tree view under 'Tags', there should be a tag named 'Investigator_Review'. The number next to it should be 10 or greater (e.g., 'Investigator_Review (10)'). Alternatively, the result viewer table should show at least 10 JPEG files with this tag applied.

task_completion.description: Verify that an Autopsy Portable Case was generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Generate Portable Case' dialog showing successful completion, or a file explorer/terminal window showing the newly created portable case directory (typically inside the case's 'Export' folder).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the handover memo with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/handover_memo.txt'. It must contain 'CASE_NAME: Evidence_Handover_2024', 'TAG_APPLIED: Investigator_Review', 'TAGGED_COUNT: <number >= 10>', and 'PORTABLE_CASE_DIR: <path>'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Autopsy graphical user interface (menus, tree view, tagging dialogs, portable case wizard) rather than just terminal commands attempting to mock sqlite databases.

integrity.description: Verify that the files tagged are actually JPEG images.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the Autopsy result viewer, the files associated with the 'Investigator_Review' tag should have .jpg or .jpeg extensions, or display image thumbnails.

integrity.description: Verify that the handover memo reflects genuine task outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TAGGED_COUNT in the memo should match the number of files actually tagged in the Autopsy screenshots, and the PORTABLE_CASE_DIR should be a realistic absolute path (e.g., /home/ga/Cases/Evidence_Handover_2024/Export/...) rather than a placeholder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Evidence_Handover_2024. Case Number: INV-PC-001. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd. Target Tag: Investigator_Review. Minimum Tagged Items: 10. Handover Memo Path: /home/ga/Reports/handover_memo.txt. The memo must contain exactly: 'CASE_NAME: Evidence_Handover_2024', 'TAG_APPLIED: Investigator_Review', 'TAGGED_COUNT: <number >= 10>', and 'PORTABLE_CASE_DIR: <valid absolute path>'.
